top_signals.title: Asian Stocks Advance on Tech Rally, Oil Climbs: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Stocks in Asia climbed for a second day as chipmakers at the heart of the artificial intelligence boom extended their rebound. Oil advanced after renewed escalation in the US-Iran conflict.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: CNBC Daily Open: AI race, potential tariffs and Middle East conflict continue to heat up
top_signals.summary: The U.S.-China AI race continues to intensify amid signs that the Trump administration could sanction China over "theft," while OpenAI ramps up IPO efforts.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump plans 100% tariffs on generic drugs in 2028
top_signals.summary: Latest trade measure intended to push companies towards manufacturing medications in the US
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
